scripts.check: node -e "const { execSync } = require('node:child_process'); const fs = require('node:fs'); const path = require('node:path'); const walk = (dir) => { for (const entry of fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true })) { const filePath = path.join(dir, entry.name); if (entry.isDirectory()) walk(filePath); else if (filePath.endsWith('.js')) execSync('node --check ' + filePath, { stdio: 'inherit' }); } }; walk('src');"
